nodes.label: Requesting Code Review Skill (subagent reviewer dispatch)
nodes.norm_label: requesting code review skill (subagent reviewer dispatch)

nodes.label: Code Review Severity Categorization
nodes.rationale: Issues are categorized as Critical (bugs, security, data loss), Important (architecture, missing features, poor error handling), or Minor (style, optimization, docs polish) to prevent marking nitpicks as Critical and ensure clear, actionable feedback.

nodes.label: UI/UX Pro Max Design Intelligence Skill
nodes.norm_label: ui/ux pro max design intelligence skill

nodes.label: Accessibility Rules (WCAG / HIG / Material)
nodes.rationale: Accessibility is CRITICAL priority: 4.5:1 contrast, alt text, keyboard nav, aria-labels. Removing focus rings or using icon-only buttons without labels are anti-patterns.

nodes.label: Skill Invocation Before Response Rule
nodes.rationale: Skills must be invoked before any response or action—even with 1% chance of applicability—because undisciplined action wastes time. Skills provide up-to-date HOW guidance that memory/training may not reflect.

nodes.label: Instruction Priority Hierarchy
nodes.rationale: User instructions (CLAUDE.md, GEMINI.md, AGENTS.md) > Superpowers skills > Default system prompt. Skills override default behavior but cannot override the user.

nodes.label: DB Mode Auto-Detection (SQLite vs MySQL via DB_HOST)
nodes.rationale: Backend auto-selects SQLite when DB_HOST is unset (local dev) and MySQL when DB_HOST is set (production on Render), enabling seamless local/production parity without code changes.
nodes.norm_label: db mode auto-detection (sqlite vs mysql via db_host)

nodes.label: SGCG Art Glass Webpage Reference Document
nodes.norm_label: sgcg art glass webpage reference document

nodes.label: Hash-Based Frontend Routing (useHashRoute hook)
nodes.rationale: All routing uses hash-based /#/path via custom useHashRoute hook and React Router DOM. Deep-link URLs work without server-side rewrites, enabling SPA hosting on static Hostinger.

nodes.label: Multi-Layer Frontend Caching Strategy
nodes.rationale: API client uses sessionStorage for catalog (5-min TTL) and localStorage for public endpoints (5-min TTL) with stale-while-revalidate to minimize backend load while keeping data fresh.

nodes.label: Ephemeral FS DB Blob Fallback Pattern
nodes.rationale: Render's filesystem is ephemeral. Images are stored both on disk and as BYTEA in the DB. Routes serve from disk if the file exists, falling back to DB column otherwise, preventing data loss on dyno restart.
nodes.norm_label: ephemeral fs db blob fallback pattern

nodes.label: Schema.org Structured Data (WebSite, Organization, ArtGallery, FAQPage)
nodes.norm_label: schema.org structured data (website, organization, artgallery, faqpage)

nodes.label: robots.txt Crawl Policy (AI + search bots allowed)
nodes.norm_label: robots.txt crawl policy (ai + search bots allowed)

nodes.label: Mobile-First Responsive Breakpoints (320/375/480/768px)
nodes.rationale: Forms use 320px as base (small phones), with breakpoints at 375, 480, 768px for progressive enhancement, ensuring touch-friendly inputs on mobile before scaling to desktop.
